prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳定在第36–37名（2026年第37名），属全国顶尖理工类院校；2025年高考周期 声誉偏正面（投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工程师计划、保研率升至27%）；2026年周期出现实验室安全事故偏负面信号，但整体关注度一般；抖音热度排名第61（一般），短 视频曝光量中等；第五轮学科评估：力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，共7 个A-/A/A+学科，航空航天与信息类学科实力突出。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等南航优势专业大类2024–2026年持续高热推荐；四川省2026年 普通高考总人数约53.5万，较2025年（约46.3万）增加约15.5%，物理类考生估算约32.9万，竞争加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前 移的强势走势、2026年小幅扩招（+2%）及本省考生明显增加（+15.5%），扩招与考生增加效应相互对冲，但考生规模增幅更大，预计位次在2025年基准7620名基础上小幅后移；预测最低位次约7742名，区间7242–8242名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间7242–8242名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报（航空航天类普通班、电气、电子信息、人工智能等），一档长空创新班和计算机科学与技术可作为冲刺目标，三档 专业作为稳妥保底。位次明显优于区间下限（7242名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 10430 → 10437 → 8302 → 11962 → 7620, with a significant forward shift to 8302 in 2023, a drop to 11962 in 2024, and a large forward shift to 7620 in 2025, showing large fluctuations in recent years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7620; the planned enrollment numbers for science (physics category) from 2021 to 2025 were 189 → 189 → 191 → 200 → 199, with a planned enrollment of 203 in 2026, a slight expansion of about 2% compared to 2025, leading to slightly intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been stable at 36–37 in recent years (37th in 2026), making it a top national science and engineering institution; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was generally positive (steadily increasing admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer Program, and a graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%); in the 2026 cycle, a negative signal emerged from a laboratory safety incident, but overall attention was moderate; its Douyin popularity ranking is 61st (average), with moderate short video exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluations: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with a total of 7 A-/A/A+ disciplines, highlighting strong capabilities in aerospace and information disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering, and other advantageous major categories at NUAA have been consistently highly recommended from 2024 to 2026; the total number of general college entrance examination takers in Sichuan Province in 2026 is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (approximately 463,000), with an estimated 329,000 physics category examinees, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong forward shift trend in 2025 rankings, the slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (+2%), and the significant increase in local examinees (+15.5%), the effects of expansion and increased examinees offset each other, but the larger increase in examinee numbers is expected to cause a slight backward shift in rankings from the 2025 baseline of 7620; the predicted lowest ranking is approximately 7742, with a range of 7242–8242.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 7242–8242, it is recommended to primarily fill in Tier 2 majors (regular Aerospace Engineering, Electrical Engineering, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence, etc.), with Tier 1 Changkong Innovation Class and Computer Science and Technology as reach goals, and Tier 3 majors as safe backups. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 7242), focus on reaching for top Tier 1 majors.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts (history category) were approximately 3390 → 3185 → 3014 → 3190, fluctuating narrowly within the 3000–3400 range, with a baseline ranking of about 3190 in 2025; from 2022 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for liberal arts (history category) were 21 → 20 → 16 → 16, showing a continuous reduction trend; in 2026, the planned enrollment is 14, a further reduction of about 12.5% compared to 2025, easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; stable at rank 36–37 in the Soft Science ranking, a top national science and engineering institution; although liberal arts majors are not the main focus, they benefit from the overall platform advantages; in the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, reputation was slightly positive (increased admission scores, Outstanding Engineer Plan); in the 2026 cycle, a laboratory safety accident introduced a slightly negative signal; Douyin popularity rank 61 (average), with limited attention to liberal arts majors; NUAA's liberal arts majors mainly correspond to Management Science and Engineering (A), Law (not separately rated), etc.; the overall engineering advantage has limited driving effect on liberal arts major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Liberal arts majors such as Law, Accounting/Finance/Auditing showed a trend from wait-and-see to recommended in 2024–2026; the estimated number of history category examinees in Sichuan Province in 2026 is about 206,000, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 178,000), intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the basically stable ranking in 2025, the significant enrollment reduction in 2026 (-12.5%), and the increase in local history category examinees (+15.7%), the enrollment reduction eases competition but the increase in examinees partially offsets the effect; the ranking is expected to move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 3190; the predicted minimum ranking is about 2931, with a range of 2491–3371.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Within the predicted ranking range of 2491–3371, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Accounting and Finance as main choices, Tier 1 Law and English Composite Innovation Class as reach options, and Tier 3 Administrative Management and Japanese as safety options. NUAA has a limited number of liberal arts majors; when applying, consider the overall platform advantages of the school and the actual competitiveness of liberal arts majors comprehensively.
